text: fetch_url Fetch a URL, support HTML, text, and image Fetches URLs and YouTube video transcripts through an MCP server.
fetch_youtube_transcript Fetch transcript for a Youtube video URL Fetches URLs and YouTube video transcripts through an MCP server.

s_fetch_page Fetches a complete web page with pagination support. Retrieves content from websites with bot-detection avoidance. For best performance, start with 'basic' mode (fastest), then only escalate to 'stealth' or 'max-stealth' modes if basic mode fails. Retrieves text and HTML content from bot-protected websites for AI assistant consumption.

s_fetch_pattern Extracts content matching regex patterns from web pages. Retrieves specific content from websites with bot-detection avoidance. Retrieves text and HTML content from bot-protected websites for AI assistant consumption.

read_pdf Reads content/metadata/images from one or more PDFs (local/URL). Each source can specify pages to extract. Securely reads and extracts text, metadata, and page counts from PDF files (local or URL) for use by AI agents.

view View file contents or list directory. For files: returns content with line numbers. Use view_range to read specific lines [start, end] (1-indexed, inclusive). For directories: lists contents with type indicator (/ for directories). Enables reading, creating, and editing files on the local filesystem through operations like view, create, string replacement, and line insertion.

create Create or overwrite a file with the specified content. Creates parent directories if they don't exist. Enables reading, creating, and editing files on the local filesystem through operations like view, create, string replacement, and line insertion.

str_replace Replace an exact string in a file. old_str must match exactly and be unique in the file. Enables reading, creating, and editing files on the local filesystem through operations like view, create, string replacement, and line insertion.

insert Insert text at a specific line in a file. insert_line = 0: beginning, N: after line N, -1: end. Enables reading, creating, and editing files on the local filesystem through operations like view, create, string replacement, and line insertion.

imageFetch Image-focused MCP fetch tool. Converts article body to Markdown and extracts/optimizes page images. Supports base64 return, file save, cross-origin images, and configurable image count/size/quality. MCP server for fetching web content and processing images. Extracts article body as Markdown and page images with optimization.

pdf-document Create a flowing PDF document with automatic pagination.

Best for: Reports, articles, letters, contracts, and documents with sequential content.

Content flows naturally from top to bottom. Pages break automatically when content exceeds page height. Use "pageBreak" to force page breaks, "divider" f Enables creative PDF generation with full design control including colors, shapes, emoji, and Unicode support. Supports everything from simple documents to artistic masterpieces.

pdf-image Generate PNG image(s) from PDF pages.

Use this to visually verify PDF output without opening external applications.

**Pages Options:**
- Single page: `pages: 1` or `pages: 3`
- Multiple pages: `pages: [1, 3, 5]`
- All pages: `pages: "all"`
- Default: page 1 only

**Viewport Scale Recommendations:* Enables creative PDF generation with full design control including colors, shapes, emoji, and Unicode support. Supports everything from simple documents to artistic masterpieces.

pdf-layout Create a PDF with precise positioning using Yoga flexbox layout.

Best for: Dashboards, slides, certificates, flyers, and designs requiring exact placement.

All items are positioned absolutely on specific pages. Use the "page" property to target different pages (e.g., page: 2 for multi-slide presen Enables creative PDF generation with full design control including colors, shapes, emoji, and Unicode support. Supports everything from simple documents to artistic masterpieces.

pdf-resume Generate a professional resume PDF from JSON Resume format. Supports layout customization, date/locale formatting, styling, fonts, and automatic page breaks. Enables creative PDF generation with full design control including colors, shapes, emoji, and Unicode support. Supports everything from simple documents to artistic masterpieces.
